title: Quicklinks — website shortcuts with favicons
description: OS app + shell integration for user-curated website shortcuts. Each quicklink is a URL + label; the favicon is derived from the URL. Managed in Settings → Quicklink and surfaced (with favicon) in the dock, Launchpad, mobile app grid, the Today widget and a dedicated Quicklinks window. Opening one pops a new native browser tab. Data persists to localStorage (public config only). The shell consumes the list via the injected useQuickLinks capability so appshell stays brand/host-free.

peers.reason: renders as a window app + injects useQuickLinks
